title: eragrostis vulgaris subsp. minor
intro: Eragrostis vulgaris subsp. minor, also known as Lesser Crow's Foot Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving stress, and promoting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis vulgaris subsp. minor include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
